title: Discrete Structures and Optimization
description: Practice year-wise MCQs from 2018 to 2026 with explanations and answer review.

questions.prompt: Which of the following is a proposition?
questions.explanation: A proposition is a declarative statement that is either true or false.

questions.prompt: If A and B are sets and A ∩ B = A, then which statement is true?
questions.explanation: If the intersection of A and B equals A, then every element of A is also in B, so A is a subset of B.

questions.prompt: The number of edges in a complete graph with n vertices is:
questions.explanation: A complete graph has one edge between every pair of vertices.

questions.prompt: Which of the following is a tautology?
questions.explanation: The law of excluded middle states that a statement or its negation must be true.

questions.prompt: The relation R on a set is antisymmetric if:
options: (a, b) ∈ R and (b, a) ∈ R ⇒ a = b
questions.answer: (a, b) ∈ R and (b, a) ∈ R ⇒ a = b
questions.explanation: Antisymmetry forbids two distinct elements from being mutually related.

questions.prompt: The recurrence T(n) = 2T(n/2) + n has solution:
questions.explanation: This is the standard divide-and-conquer recurrence with a linear cost at each level.

questions.prompt: In a connected undirected graph, a spanning tree contains:
questions.explanation: A spanning tree connects all vertices with the minimum possible number of edges.

questions.prompt: The number of possible binary relations on a set of n elements is:
questions.explanation: A binary relation is a subset of the Cartesian product A × A, which has n^2 pairs.

questions.prompt: Which of the following is true for a bipartite graph?
options: It can be colored with two colors
questions.answer: It can be colored with two colors
questions.explanation: A bipartite graph has vertices partitioned into two sets such that every edge joins a vertex from each set.
